entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 60
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
